final_choice.row_label: Salary and other employment benefit expenses

variables.notes: Applied SG&A hierarchy: explicit 'Selling, General & Admin' exists but appears empty in preview, so included it plus populated overhead buckets for coverage. Excluded 'Operating expenses' because it is a subtotal and includes non-SG&A items. Excluded 'Other operating expenses' because nearby detail suggests it likely contains direct operating costs (fuel, vessel charges, repairs), not pure SG&A.
